prompts.label: Priority dashboard
prompts.prompt: Using Relay's real task data, create and open an interactive task-priority dashboard with the exact visible heading Relay priority dashboard, grouped by priority with assignee and due-date details. Match Relay's native visual style and use no emoji.

prompts.label: Team workload summary
prompts.prompt: Using Relay's real task data, create and open a team workload summary grouped by assignee with open, in-progress, and completed counts. Match Relay's native visual style and use no emoji.

prompts.label: Delivery overview
prompts.prompt: Using Relay's real task data, create and open a delivery overview with completion progress, upcoming due dates, and the highest-priority work that needs attention. Match Relay's native visual style and use no emoji.
